title: Firewall configuration standards
requirement: Install and maintain a firewall configuration to protect cardholder data

title: Default passwords and security parameters
requirement: Change vendor-supplied defaults before installing on network

title: Change default system passwords
requirement: Change defaults for any system component before connecting to network

title: Protect stored cardholder data
requirement: Keep cardholder data storage to a minimum

title: Render PAN unreadable
requirement: Render PAN unreadable anywhere it is stored
notes: Three legacy DB columns still store plain PAN

title: Encrypt transmission of cardholder data
requirement: Use strong cryptography and security protocols

title: Address common coding vulnerabilities
requirement: Train developers in secure coding techniques

title: Strong authentication
requirement: Implement strong authentication for all personnel
notes: MFA coverage at 87% on non-prod systems

title: Audit trails
requirement: Implement audit trails linking access to system components

title: Retain audit trail history
requirement: Retain audit trail history for at least one year

title: Vulnerability scans
requirement: Run internal/external vulnerability scans at least quarterly
notes: Quarterly scan scheduled for next week

title: Information security policy
requirement: Establish and publish an information security policy

title: Policies for information security
requirement: Management direction and support for information security

title: Review of policies for information security
requirement: Policies reviewed at planned intervals or when significant changes occur

title: Information security roles and responsibilities
requirement: Define and allocate information security responsibilities

title: Access to networks and network services
requirement: Users shall only access network services they are authorized to use

title: User registration and de-registration
requirement: Formal user registration and de-registration process

title: Restrictions to information access
requirement: Access to information and application functions restricted

title: Controls against malware
requirement: Detection prevention and recovery controls to protect against malware

title: Information backup
requirement: Backup copies of information and software

title: Management of technical vulnerabilities
requirement: Timely information about technical vulnerabilities
notes: Critical CVE from June patch cycle unremediated

title: Responsibilities and procedures
requirement: Management responsibilities and procedures to ensure quick incident response

title: Assessment and decision on information security events
requirement: Assess information security events and decide if they are incidents

title: Planning information security continuity
requirement: Determine requirements for continuity during adverse situations

title: Identification of applicable legislation
requirement: Identify statutory regulatory and contractual requirements
